binance.title: Binance 连接

binance.step_2: 点击“创建API”，选择“系统生成”
binance.step_3:
仅启用：
✅ 现货和杠杆交易
binance.step_4:
务必禁用：
❌ 资金提取
❌ 通用资产划转
binance.warn_withdrawals: 未启用“资金提取”权限，保证即使密钥泄露也无法提币。
binance.encryption_note: 🔒 你的密钥经过加密（AES-128）存储。即便是客服也无法读取明文。
binance.next_step_desc: 前往AI机器人页开启“实盘模式”，机器人将在Binance执行真实交易。
binance.limit_default: 💡 默认单笔交易上限为$50（可在机器人设置中修改）。
binance.disconnect_msg: 机器人将自动切换回模拟模式。你可以随时重新连接。
binance.step_4_part:

❌ 启用提现

help.title: Help & Support
help.hero_sub: Everything you need to know to use SignalX and trade safely on Binance.
help.safety_text: SignalX NEVER stores your money. Your USDT, EUR and crypto stay 100% on your Binance account. SignalX only sends buy/sell orders via your API keys (without withdrawal permission).

s1.title: Create your SignalX account
s1.step1_d: No credit card required at the start. The Free plan gives you 3 pairs and 5 AI predictions / day.
s1.step2_d: You'll get an alert every time the bot opens/closes a trade.
s1.step3_d: Unlocks unlimited pairs, Live trading, 30-day backtest, priority alerts.

s2.title: Where to put your money (on Binance)
s2.intro: SignalX does not receive your funds. You first deposit money on Binance, then connect your Binance account to SignalX. Here are 3 ways to deposit:
s2.opt1_d: In the Binance app → Deposit → "Buy with card". You can buy USDT directly. Instant.
s2.opt2_d: Binance → Deposit → EUR → SEPA transfer. Get the IBAN, send from your bank. When money arrives, convert EUR → USDT.
s2.opt3_d: If you already have BTC/ETH elsewhere (Coinbase, Kraken, hardware wallet), transfer them to Binance. Network fees only.
s2.tip: 💡 Tip: start with $100–$300 to test. You can always add more later.

s3.title: Convert to USDT
s3.intro: The bot trades exclusively in USDT pairs (BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT…). Convert your balance before connecting:
s3.step2_d: Built-in tool, instant exchange rate, ~0% fees.
s3.step3_d: Check your USDT balance in the Spot wallet before continuing.

s4.title: Connect Binance to SignalX
s4.intro: Your API keys allow SignalX to send orders on your account. They are AES-128 encrypted in our database.
s4.step1_t: On Binance → API Management → Create API
s4.step1_d: Profile → API Management → "Create API" → choose "System generated".
s4.step2_d: Enable: ✅ Enable Spot & Margin Trading. Nothing else.
s4.step3_d:
❌ Enable Withdrawals — DISABLED
❌ Enable Universal Transfer — DISABLED
This is CRITICAL for security.
s4.warning: ⚠️ Without the Withdrawals permission, no one can withdraw your funds — even if your keys were compromised.

s5.title: Configure your AI Bot
s5.intro: Two modes available. Always start with PAPER.
s5.paper_desc: No real money used. Default virtual capital: 1000 USDT. Ideal to test the strategy 1–2 weeks before going LIVE.
s5.live_desc: The bot executes real orders on Binance. Default limit: $50 max per trade (editable in bot settings).
s5.rec5: Pairs: BTC, ETH, SOL to start (controlled volatility)

s6.title: Monitor your performance
s6.b1: Bot tab: open positions, unrealized P&L, badges of activated features
s6.b2: P&L Dashboard: capital evolution chart, win-rate, drawdown, top symbols
s6.b3: Push notifications: alert at every trade opened / closed

s7.title: How to withdraw your gains
s7.reminder: SignalX never touches your money. You withdraw directly from Binance.
s7.step1_d: Sign in to your Binance account.
s7.step2_t: Check your balance in Spot Wallet
s7.step2_d: Your balance reflects all bot gains/losses in real time.
s7.step3_d: Spot → Convert → USDT to EUR. Instant rate.
s7.step4_t: Withdraw → SEPA transfer to your bank
s7.step4_d: Withdrawal → choose SEPA → enter your IBAN → received in 1–2 business days (free).
s7.stop_desc: Bot tab → toggle "BOT ACTIVE" → OFF. Or use the Kill-switch in settings for instant pause without closing open positions.

s8.title: Security — Never skip these steps
s8.b1: NEVER share your API keys with anyone (not even Binance support)
s8.b2: Enable 2FA (Google Authenticator) on Binance AND SignalX
s8.b3: Disable "Enable Withdrawals" on your Binance API keys
s8.b4: In doubt, revoke the keys on Binance instantly
s8.b5: Your keys are AES-128 encrypted in our database — unreadable even by support

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Can the bot lose my money?
faq.a1: Yes, like any trading tool. Stop-loss limits the loss per trade (~3% by default). Start with PAPER to validate the strategy.
faq.q2: How do I cancel my Premium subscription?
faq.a2: Profile → Premium → "Cancel subscription". You keep access until the end of the paid period.
faq.q3: Does the bot trade while I sleep?
faq.a3: Yes, 24/7. The bot scans markets every 5 minutes. You can disable it anytime via the toggle.
faq.q4: Why isn't the bot opening positions?
faq.a4: It's waiting for strong signals (RSI + EMA + Claude AI validation). Patience — a bot that doesn't open is a bot that doesn't lose.
faq.q5: Are my API keys really safe?
faq.a5: Yes. They are AES-128 encrypted before storage. No one — not even support — can read them in clear. Plus, without Withdrawal permission, they can only be used for trading.

help.footer: Crypto trading involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

q1.title: 当机器人在实盘模式交易时，你的资金存储在哪里？

q2.title: 币安API密钥中，你绝对不能启用哪个权限？
